drive_dates: ● Online Test - 15 th May (2 nd half) ● Interviews - 22 nd May
company_website: https://in.adp.com for 2025 batch - internship cum placement for 2026 batch – internship only
stream_required: B.E / B.Tech (CSE / IT only), excluding all ECE / EE / Non-Circuit Branches etc
date_of_joining: 1 st July 2025 Pay Package / Stipend Stipend during 3 months Internship : 30 K per month Salary after 3 months of Internship : CTC 6 LPA + Duration of Internship : 3 months Stipend : 30 K per month
selection_process_steps: Pariksha’ aptitude Test [‾60-70 minutes covering Quantitative Aptitude
Computer Concepts in the college computer lab –
Google Chrome version 50 & above to be installed on the computer/laptop]
[aptitude test can be completed prior to the pre-placement talk/ interview
process – per the number of student registrations
infrastructure/computers at the college or with students)
Pre-placement talk by Senior Manager from ADP (30 minutes) in the college
premises prior to the interview process.
